title: Beef and Cheese Canadian Wrap
description: A hearty and comforting wrap filled with tender beef and melted cheese.
instructions: Preheat a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the ground beef and cook until browned, breaking it up into small pieces as it cooks.
Add the Canadian bacon slices to the skillet and cook until crispy.
Add the shredded cheese to the skillet and stir until melted.
Warm the tortilla wraps by wrapping them in a damp paper towel and microwaving for 20-30 seconds.
Assemble the wraps by spooning the beef and cheese mixture onto the center of each wrap, followed by a spoonful of mayonnaise and ketchup.
Add lettuce and tomato slices if desired.
Fold the bottom half of the wrap up over the filling, then fold in the sides and roll the wrap up tightly.
